revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Mbox | name = This is a redirect | type = move | image = none | style = margin-top: 1.1em; border: solid 1px darkblue; border-left-width: 0.5em; | textstyle...'
do not render parameter as text

revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:This is a redirect]]

revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Pppery|Pppery]] ([[User talk:Pppery|talk]]): Not redundant, try reading the documentation. It doesn't work the same way. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 August 13#Template:Redirect category shell]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

Reverted [[WP:AGF|good faith]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Prahlad balaji|Prahlad balaji]] ([[User talk:Prahlad balaji|talk]]): It is better unlinked; there is nothing about redirects at the link. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/KATMAKROFAN|KATMAKROFAN]] ([[User talk:KATMAKROFAN|talk]]): This is a long-standing style, please establish consensus before arbitrarily changing things. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

revision.text: Birth and Education: Life of Birbhum (From 1990-1993) Life of Kushkari (From 1993-1994) Life of Rajapur from 1994-1997) Life from 1997-2000 Life from 2001-2008 Life from 2008-2016

revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/KARTICK CHANDRA BARMAN|KARTICK CHANDRA BARMAN]] ([[User talk:KARTICK CHANDRA BARMAN|talk]]) to last revision by Nyuszika7H. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

Protected "[[Template:Redirect category shell]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
test not-really-serious method of getting this template page out of Category:Miscellaneous redirects
Undid revision 805550346 by [[Special:Contributions/Enterprisey|Enterprisey]] ([[User talk:Enterprisey|talk]]) didn't work
add a noinclude to try and get this template out of the miscellaneous redirects category
add another noinclude element for the same purpose
alright this category is weird - trying something else (wrapping just the category inclusion in includeonly tags)
Fix misnested bold/colour tags per edit request
Undid revision 902382644 by [[Special:Contributions/Paine Ellsworth|Paine Ellsworth]] ([[User talk:Paine Ellsworth|talk]]) no, that means that nothing shows for full and TE prot levels
/* top */per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2020 May 2]], replaced: protected redirects → Fully protected redirects
Undid revision 956180592 by [[Special:Contributions/Timrollpickering|Timrollpickering]] ([[User talk:Timrollpickering|talk]]) it detects all levels
sync sysop case per talk; move lock into called template
automatically detect and categorize wikidata redirects. this is going to cause some duplicate templates on certain pages, but that's a minor concern.
should always be a soft redirect (mainly for doc pages)
always a HARD redirect hat is
double renderings of rcats on redirects is no "minor concern" - reverted at least until bot request is approved - see talk page for discussion
Copyedit, add {{talk other}} to detect if page is a talk page and modify output accordingly
removing arrow image as per talk page discussion. It's unnecessary and confusing.
remove "Add topic" and new talk page experience from categorized redirects
per edit request on talk page - reduce the probability of mistakes when one adds the template to an incorrectly protected rcat
okay to see the icon on redirects

Use block indent instead of misused definition list markup to resolve obscure Linter syntax error at a few pages including [[:Template:Country data Congo]]. Ideally, this should not change the rendered output (it appears to make the h= text maybe one pixel closer to the text above it, which I hope is OK).
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Use block indent instead of misused definition list markup to resolve obscure Linter syntax error at a few pages including [[:Template:Country data Congo]]. Ideally, this should not change the rendered output (it appears to make the h= text maybe one pixel closer to the text above it, which I hope is OK).

remove Tfm template - discussion closed as withdrawn
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
remove Tfm template - discussion closed as withdrawn
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23052491609|manual triggered pipeline]]
remove Tfm template - discussion closed as withdrawn
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23053570201|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23573030467|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
